design_philosophy.description: A high-precision tool for mechanics. Dark mode by default to reduce glare in workshops. High contrast for readability in low light. The interface feels like a well-machined part—solid, functional, and devoid of unnecessary decoration.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3 headings. Adds a heavy, industrial feel.

mono.usage: Part numbers, specifications, prices, VINs, and technical data.

layout_system.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but shifted up (p-4 -> p-6)

buttons.specs: h-12 px-6 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide font-bold text-sm

variants.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[2px]
variants.outline: border-2 border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground hover:border-primary/50

cards.classes: bg-card border border-border/50 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.features: Add a small 'corner cut' or technical marking (like a barcode or ID number) in the corner for aesthetics.

inputs.classes: h-12 bg-background border-2 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-sm font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

badges.classes: rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider font-mono

visual_enhancers.grid_lines: Use a background pattern of faint grid lines (opacity 0.05) on the main background to reinforce the 'blueprint' vibe.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: very subtle scanline overlay on images.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use 'stroke-width=2' for a sturdy look.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons depress mechanically (translate-y). Hovering parts cards highlights specifications.

media.image_style: High contrast, desaturated background, sharp details. Use overlays (black/50) to ensure text readability.

transitions.page_load: Fade in with slight upward slide (y: 20 -> 0)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is Zinc-50 or Zinc-200. Avoid dark grey text on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible 2px offset ring in Primary Color (#dc2626) for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: FONTS: Add '@fontsource/chivo' and '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono' to the project and import in index.js.
THEME: Force 'dark' class on the html element. This app is dark mode only by design.
GRID: Use the 'Grid Borders' strategy for the main layout. Create a `Layout` component that adds the background grid pattern.
NAVBAR: Sticky, glassmorphism but with a 'machined metal' feel (dark, high blur, 1px top/bottom border).
PWA: Ensure service worker is registered for offline capability as per requirements.
AI CHAT: Floating action button (FAB) in the bottom right, styled like a distinct tool (e.g., a diagnostic scanner icon).
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp/industrial in this case).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
